query: SELECT code, title, totalLessons, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lessons WHERE courseId = courses.id) as actual_lessons FROM courses ORDER BY code LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT code, title, totalLessons, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lessons WHERE courseId = courses.id) as actual_lessons FROM courses ORDER BY code LIMIT 10;
